//: Workspace path mappings for Nx, read by @nx/enforce-module-boundaries to resolve SCOPED lib imports (@my-portfolio/*) to their project so depConstraints can be enforced. Only lib entry points belong here. The app's legacy convenience aliases (components/*, util/*, store/*, images/*) intentionally live ONLY in jsconfig.json — they are in-app imports, not project boundaries, and must not be mapped here or the rule would flag every one of them. When libs migrate to TS (A3), per-project tsconfig.json files will extend this.
